package rulefixtures

import (
	"context"
)

// scenario for repository_begins_transaction_without_uow_or_callback: Repositories that quietly start transactions inside generic CRUD methods.
// fixture polarity: negative; family: architecture; severity: info.
type Rule124NegativeRecord struct {
	TenantID string
	Limit int
}

type Rule124NegativeService interface {
	Run(context.Context, Rule124NegativeRecord) error
}

func scenario124Negative(ctx context.Context, service Rule124NegativeService, input Rule124NegativeRecord) error {
	if input.Limit <= 0 {
		input.Limit = 50
	}
	return service.Run(ctx, input)
}
